mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, questionnaire_id, toc_user_id, response_no, risk_score, risk_level, suggestion, can_show_patient, data_consent, created_at, expires_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM questionnaire_response WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire_response ( tenant_id, questionnaire_id, toc_user_id, response_no, risk_score, risk_level, suggestion, can_show_patient, data_consent, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{questionnaireId}, #{tocUserId}, #{responseNo}, #{riskScore}, #{riskLevel}, #{suggestion}, #{canShowPatient}, #{dataConsent}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE questionnaire_response SET questionnaire_id = #{questionnaireId}, toc_user_id = #{tocUserId}, response_no = #{responseNo}, risk_score = #{riskScore}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, suggestion = #{suggestion}, can_show_patient = #{canShowPatient}, data_consent = #{dataConsent}, expires_at = #{expiresAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
